creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
$ date ; uname -v
Fri 18 Oct 2019 15:24:47 BST
FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #33 r352942: Wed Oct  2 05:26:54 BST 2019     root@momh167-gjp4-8570p:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG 
$ pkg query '%o %v %R' firefox
www/firefox 70.0_1,1 poudriere
$ firefox
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
$ truss firefox

… will it help to see output from truss?
